for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['O', 'S', 'Y', 'N'] and n['pixels'] > 7:

        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")

print("\nRed dot:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'r' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        b = n['boundary']
        print(f"  at ({b[0][0]}, {b[0][1]})")

print("\nPurple L-shape:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'p':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['pixels']}px, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}")
</parameter>
</function>
